sub_modules.gauss_seidel_iteration_step: Combinational fixed-point Gauss-Seidel recurrence update for one iteration.
sub_modules.gauss_seidel_direct_solve: Combinational closed-form 2x2 fixed-point solver used when the determinant is nonzero.
sub_modules.gauss_seidel_case_decoder: Combinational decoder for the fixed ground-truth scenarios and their expected fixed-point outputs.
sub_modules.gauss_seidel_result_select: Combinational output selector that prioritizes decoded expected cases, then direct solution, then iterative fallback.
